visual_description: A woman with dark hair, wearing a brown jacket over a light-colored top, stands in a dimly lit room with orange walls. She holds a white cordless phone to her ear, then lowers it to look at it. Behind her are two wooden doors with circular porthole-style windows and two framed pictures on the wall.
audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical tone plays throughout the clip.
